info.title: Industrial Edge Common Databus Payload Format Manufactured OpenAPI
info.summary: Industrial Edge is an open, ready-to-use edge computing platform, with edge devices, edge applications (apps) and connectivity through an integrated app and device management infrastructure. Published specification defines the structure of telemetry payloads on the Industrial Edge databus.
info.description: Manufactured OpenAPI artifact for Industrial Edge Common Databus Payload Format. This file was synthesized by Last Mile from curated research JSON and is not vendor-certified. Use it as an agent-consumable starting point, then validate paths, schemas, authentication, and server URLs with the vendor before production use. Industrial Edge is an open, ready-to-use edge computing platform, with edge devices, edge applications (apps) and connectivity through an integrated app and device management infrastructure. This artifact is a message-format specification used for telemetry exchange rather than a business CRUD API. Asset data is N/A. Telemetry data is Supported. Writeback is N/A.

servers.description: Placeholder server template. Replace with the vendor-confirmed API host and base path before generating production clients.
